title: Griefcase
description: This mod adds many new ways to troll your friends, such as fake ores, remote tnt, jumpscares, and more!
body:
A mod that adds many griefing tools with many to come

everything so far:

- Fake ores
- Remote TNT
- Cursed pickaxe
- Super snowball launcher
- Jumpscares
- Invisble fluid
- Mr.Beast mask
- Non collidable dirt
- prank tools

This mod will get more stuff, if you have any ideas contact me on discord at @0gagaer6
if theres any bugs you find PLS LET ME KNOW SO I CAN FIX IT
